name: reviews-reputation-reputation-score-aggregator
description: T171 ReputationScoreAggregator — DATA_PIPELINE archetype. Additive-subtractive aggregate: subscribes to both ReviewPublished (add) and ReviewRetracted (remove). Both handlers call recalculate() which fetches PUBLISHED-only reviews. Score clamped [1.0, 5.0].

nodes.description: Iron rule validation + DNA compliance check: retraction-removes-from-aggregate, published-filter-only, score-clamp-1-to-5, store-before-enqueue
Retrieve DATA_PIPELINE arch pattern for T171: additive-subtractive-aggregate-001, reputation-score-clamping-001
Break T171 into: two @EventPattern handlers (ReviewPublished + ReviewRetracted) → both call recalculate() → fetch PUBLISHED-only → weighted avg → clamp [1.0,5.0] → storeDocument → enqueue
Generate reputation-score-aggregator.service.ts — additive-subtractive pattern. Both event handlers call same recalculate(). PUBLISHED filter. Math.max(1.0, Math.min(5.0, rawScore)) before write.
Named check validation: retraction_removes_from_aggregate, reputation_score_clamped_1_to_5, published_filter_only, store_before_enqueue
Score generated code 0-100 against T171 iron rules: both event subscriptions present, PUBLISHED filter, score clamp, DNA-8
Route: score >= 85 → n8 promote, score < 85 → n3 iterate
